creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-06-15 21:13:58 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    graphics             Makefile 
  Added files:
    graphics/rubygem-geokit Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Rubygem-geokit is a Ruby gem for maps-based apps. Provides geocoding
  through multiple providers with failover and geo distance calculations.
  Combine with the Rails plugin for IP-based location lookup and
  ActiveRecord extensions for geo-based finders.
  
  WWW: http://geokit.rubyforge.org/
  
  PR:             ports/135461
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1269    +1 -0      ports/graphics/Makefile
  1.1       +19 -0     ports/graphics/rubygem-geokit/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/graphics/rubygem-geokit/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/graphics/rubygem-geokit/pkg-descr (new)
